subject: Interview Availability
body: Hi Shivam, are you available Thursday or Friday for a quick call to discuss the backend engineer role?

subject: Weekly Product Update
body: Here’s everything we shipped this week. New features, performance improvements, and bug fixes.

subject: Need project update ASAP
body: Can you send me a clear project status update and revised timeline today? This is urgent.

subject: Following up on proposal
body: Hi, just following up on the proposal we discussed last week. Let me know your thoughts.

subject: Please share documents
body: Could you send over your updated resume and relevant documents for our records?
